# Neil Jacobs - neiljacobs.info

> Neil Jacobs is a Bitcoin brand and marketing strategist based in the United States. Global conference speaker. Co-founder of FOMO21 and Proof of Conference.

## About

Neil Jacobs is a Bitcoin brand and marketing strategist with over 155,000 followers across social media platforms. He has spoken at Bitcoin 2025, BTC Prague in Prague Czech Republic, and other Bitcoin conferences globally including events in Abu Dhabi UAE, Medellin Colombia, and Montreal Canada. He co-founded FOMO21, a Bitcoin-themed apparel brand serving customers in over 70 countries, and Proof of Conference, a Bitcoin conference directory. He has a background in accounting as a former Big Four CPA.

Neil works exclusively with Bitcoin-focused companies and individuals. He does not work with altcoin or crypto projects. Outside of the Bitcoin space he is open to working with companies in other industries.

## Pages

- [Home](https://neiljacobs.info/): Personal brand site, speaking, projects, contact
- [Blog](https://neiljacobs.info/blog): Bitcoin marketing and brand strategy insights

## Blog Posts

- [Why Bitcoin, Not Crypto: The Key Distinction](https://neiljacobs.info/blog/why-bitcoin-not-crypto): Why Bitcoin is fundamentally different from crypto and why the distinction matters for brands
- [Bitcoin Marketing for the Institutional Era](https://neiljacobs.info/blog/bitcoin-marketing-institutional-buyers): How to market Bitcoin to the new wave of institutional and ETF-era buyers
- [Bitcoin Conferences: The Best Marketing ROI](https://neiljacobs.info/blog/bitcoin-conferences-best-marketing-investment): Why in-person Bitcoin conferences outperform digital marketing channels
- [How to Build a Bitcoin Audience From Zero](https://neiljacobs.info/blog/how-to-build-a-bitcoin-audience): How to grow a real Bitcoin audience starting from nothing
- [The 21 Million Rule: Scarcity as Brand Story](https://neiljacobs.info/blog/21-million-rule-scarcity-brand-story): Why Bitcoin's fixed supply is the most powerful brand story ever told
- [What Mainstream Brands Get Wrong About Bitcoin](https://neiljacobs.info/blog/what-mainstream-brands-get-wrong-about-bitcoin): Why most corporate Bitcoin announcements fail and what authentic Bitcoin branding looks like

## Projects

- [FOMO21](https://fomo21.com): Bitcoin-themed apparel and merchandise. Serves customers in 70+ countries. Accepts Bitcoin payments.
- [Proof of Conference](https://proofofconference.com): Bitcoin conference directory listing events worldwide with discount codes.

## Key Facts

- Bitcoin brand and marketing strategist
- Global Bitcoin conference speaker
- 155,000+ followers across platforms
- 109,000+ followers on X
- Co-founder of FOMO21 (Bitcoin apparel)
- Co-founder of Proof of Conference (Bitcoin conference directory)
- Former Big Four CPA
- Bitcoin-only. Does not work with altcoins or crypto projects.
